title: selaginella arsiclada
intro: Selaginella arsiclada, also known as the 'Dwarf Spikemoss' or 'Rosette Spikemoss', is a low-growing, evergreen plant species that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella arsiclada include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
